zh.Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾
zh.Coningsby, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾康寧斯比
zh.Caister-on-Sea, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可凱斯特爾--希亞
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Fastolf於大約1370年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，他的父親John Fastolf37歲，母親Mary Park17歲。他於1403年與Alice de Avenel在英國林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1459年11月6日在英國諾福爾可享年90歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Fastolf于大约1370年出生在英国林可爾史爾时，他的父亲John Fastolf37岁，母亲Mary Park17岁。他于1403年与Alice de Avenel在英国林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1459年11月6日在英国諾福爾可享年90岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Fastolf was born about 1370, in Lincolnshire, England, his father, John Fastolf, was 37 and his mother, Mary Park, was 17. He married Alice de Avenel in 1403, in Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 6 November 1459, in Norfolk, England, at the age of 90, and was buried in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Fastolf est né environ 1370, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, John Fastolf, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mary Park, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Avenel en 1403, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 6 novembre 1459, à Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterré à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Fastolf um 1370 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Fastolf 37 und seine Mutter Mary Park 17. Er hat 1403 in Lincolnshire, England Alice de Avenel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. November 1459 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Norfolk, England und wurde in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Fastolf è nato il circa 1370 nel Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, John Fastolf, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Mary Park, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Avenel nel 1403, nel Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 novembre 1459, nel Norfolk, England, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolto a Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Caister-on-Sea, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクケイステル-オン-セア
ja.lifeSummary: John Fastolfが約1370年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Fastolfは37歳，母Mary Parkは17歳であった。1403年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでAlice de Avenelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1459年11月6日にイギリスノーフォルクで90歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Fastolf(이)가 대략 1370년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Fastolf(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Park(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1403년 영국 링코실르에서 Alice de Avenel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1459년 11월 6일 영국 노르폴크에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Fastolf nasceu aproximadamente 1370, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Fastolf, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Mary Park, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Avenel em 1403, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de novembro de 1459, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 90 anos, e foi sepultado em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Fastolf родился около 1370 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Fastolf было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Park, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Avenel в 1403 г. в местности линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 6 ноября 1459 г. в местности норфолк, Англия в возрасте 90 лет и был похоронен в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Fastolf nació aproximadamente 1370, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Fastolf, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Mary Park, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Alice de Avenel en 1403, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de noviembre de 1459, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultado en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
